message.content:
@startuml
participant "INBRPlayCCSink" as A
participant "CNBRPfwPlayCtl" as B
participant "CNBRPfwUICtl" as C
participant "INBRCommand" as D
participant "CNBRUImgr" as E
participant "CNBRPlayMgr" as F
participant "CNBRPlayBar" as G
participant "CWbxBmpButton" as H

box "CNBRPfwPlayCtl" #LightBlue
  participant A
  participant B
end box

box "CNBRUImgr" #LightBlue
  participant D
  participant E
end box

note over A, H #White
  **nmac notify nbr_pfw mute message**
end note

A -> A : NotifyInfo
A --> B : NotifyInfo
B -> C : OnMixerMuteNotify

note over B #LightYellow
  NBR_CC_PFW_INFO_MUTE_STATE
end note

C -> D : OnHandleCommand

note over C #LightYellow
  NBR2_PLAY_UI_MIXER_MUTE_NOTIFY
end note

D --> E : OnHandleCommand

note over D #LightYellow
  NBR2_PLAY_UI_MIXER_MUTE_NOTIFY
end note

E -> F : HandleMixerMuteNotify
F -> G : MuteVolume
G -> H : SetChecked

@enduml
